title: fimbristylis scabrisquama
intro: Fimbristylis scabrisquama, also known as the rough-fruited fimbristylis, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Cyperaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Fimbristylis scabrisquama include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Fimbristylis scabrisquama is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and respiratory infections.
